title: Generated CLI reference
objective: Generate or drift-check CLI command reference without overwriting curated documentation.
description: Adds a safe generation/drift-check path for docs/reference/commands.md based on runtime help or registry metadata.
parallel_safe_reason: Generated reference work can run independently after baseline.
must: Generate only delimited blocks or a separate generated file.
Add drift check against runtime help or registry.
not_included: Replacing all docs with generated output.
acceptance: Manual content outside generated blocks remains untouched.
CI or release can detect drift.
validation_hints: Prefer a --check mode so CI can fail on drift without rewriting files.
